Python scikit-image reproduction of skeletonization on leaf.jpg yielded >1200 branches, confirming 20 is a valid minimum threshold.
Python scikit-image reproduction of skeletonization on leaf.jpg yielded >700 junctions, confirming 5 is a valid minimum threshold.
Task setup and export scripts use this exact path for the expected output.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real leaf photograph included as a built-in sample in Fiji (File > Open Samples > Leaf). The expected minimum thresholds of 20 branches and 5 junctions are verified, as an independent programmatic reproduction of the skeletonization process using scikit-image yielded over 1,200 branches and 700 junctions. The expected output path /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/skeleton_analysis.csv is strictly enforced by the export script.
